sections.heading: Using live benefits data
sections.body: Add the PDF file `2026 Klaviyo US Benefits At-a-Glance (1).pdf` under the project `Source/` folder. The API will extract text automatically. Until then, this placeholder reflects that US benefits power the model’s qualitative copy in the app.

sections.heading: Highlights
sections.body: Medical, dental, and vision plans; 401(k) with employer match; ESPP; flexible PTO; parental leave; Modern Health; K-Flex LSA; K-Pro Learn; commuter benefits; and more. See internal Total Rewards materials for authoritative details.
